title: DragonEgg
body:
# DragonEgg - Ultimate Dragon Power Plugin

[![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/version-1.0.0-blue?style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/DragonEgg/Plugin/releases)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-MIT-green?style=for-the-badge)](LICENSE)

**Transform the iconic Dragon Egg into an artifact of immense power!** DragonEgg is a modern, optimized plugin that grants permanent abilities, extra hearts, and legendary mechanics to players who possess the mythical Dragon Egg.

---

## Visual Effects

DragonEgg includes stunning visual feedback:

| Effect | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| **Particles** | Dragon breath, end rods, flames around player |
| **Glowing** | Team-based glow effect for bonded players |
| **Custom Item** | Custom name and lore for the Dragon Egg |
| **Sounds** | Unique sounds for each ability activation |

---

## Requirements

| Software | Version |
|----------|---------|
| **Paper/Spigot** | 1.20.4+ (compatible with 1.19-1.20.x) |
| **Java** | 17+ |

**Optional Dependencies:**
- Vault (for permission integration)
- LuckPerms (for permission groups)
- PlaceholderAPI (for placeholders)

---

## Installation

1. Download the latest version
2. Place `DragonEgg.jar` in your `plugins/` folder
3. Restart your server
4. Configure in `plugins/DragonEgg/config.yml`

---

## Commands

```
/dragonegg                  - Show help
/dragonegg give <player>    - Give Dragon Egg to player
/dragonegg reload           - Reload configuration
/dragonegg info [player]    - Show Dragon Egg statistics
/dragonegg sethearts <amt>  - Set extra hearts
/dragonegg menu             - Open GUI configuration menu
/dragonegg addEffect <effect> <level>  - Add effect
/dragonegg removeEffect <effect>       - Remove effect
/dragonegg setEffectLevel <effect> <level> - Set effect level
/dragonegg clearEffects     - Clear all effects
```

---

## Permissions

```yaml
dragonegg.use                 # Use Dragon Egg features (default: true)
dragonegg.admin               # Full admin access (default: op)
dragonegg.commands.give       # Give Dragon Egg
dragonegg.commands.reload     # Reload config
dragonegg.commands.info       # View info
dragonegg.commands.sethearts  # Set hearts
dragonegg.commands.menu       # Open menu
dragonegg.bypass.limit        # Bypass heart/effect limits
dragonegg.bypass.cooldown     # Bypass ability cooldowns
dragonegg.hearts.vip          # +2 extra hearts
dragonegg.hearts.mvp          # +4 extra hearts
dragonegg.hearts.admin        # +10 extra hearts
```

---

## Configuration

All features are fully configurable in `config.yml`:

```yaml
# Language (en, ua, pl, de, fr, es)
language: en

# Effects
effects:
  STRENGTH:
    enabled: true
    level: 1
    permanent: true

# Hearts
hearts:
  extra: 4
  max-cap: 40

# Mechanics
mechanics:
  aura:
    enabled: true
    radius: 10.0
  fury:
    enabled: true
    hp-threshold: 20.0
  shield:
    negation-chance: 10.0
  revive:
    cooldown-hours: 24
```

---

## Multi-Language Support

DragonEgg includes translations for:

| Language | Code |
|----------|------|
| 🇬🇧 English | en |
| 🇺🇦 Ukrainian | ua |
| 🇵🇱 Polish | pl |
| 🇩🇪 German | de |
| 🇫🇷 French | fr |
| 🇪🇸 Spanish | es |

---

## 📊 Evolution Progression

| Level | Kills | Playtime | Unlocks |
|-------|-------|----------|---------|
| 1 | 0 | 0 min | Base effects |
| 2 | 10 | 1 hour | Strength II |
| 3 | 25 | 3 hours | Speed II, Regen I |
| 4 | 50 | 6 hours | Resistance I |
| 5 | 100 | 12 hours | Absorption II, Fire Resist |

---

## GUI Menu Features

Access `/dragonegg menu` for:

- **Effects Management** - Add, remove, modify effects
- **Hearts Configuration** - Adjust bonus HP
- **Mechanics Toggles** - Enable/disable abilities
- **Visual Settings** - Customize particles and sounds
- **Evolution Progress** - View level and stats

---

## Support

| Platform | Link |
|----------|------|
| **Discord** | [Join our Discord](https://discord.gg/mUz2k7X6ju) |
| **Issues** | [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/4rubka/DragonEgg/issues) |

---

## License

---

**DragonEgg** - Unleash the power of the End Dragon!

*Made for Zenith Hub members*
